title: As Internet Blackout Hits Day 45, Iranians Bemoan State Hypocrisy and Economic Risks
summary_full: Iranians enduring the latest communications shutdown warn that it’s crippling businesses. Critics say officials flagrantly use the internet they block citizens from.
summary_public: Iranians enduring the latest communications shutdown warn that it’s crippling businesses. Critics say officials flagrantly use the internet they block citizens from.
